title: >
content:
>
> I could use your brain on this—especially your way of breaking things down and making sense of the madness. It’s narrative-heavy, but also technical. Think: translation layer between myth, language, and machine.
>
> Can I show you sometime next week? This might be one of those rare times where your poker odds brain meets my chaos, and we make something that lasts.

* * *

🔎 Context Notes (You -> Forrest)
---------------------------------

You’ve been:

* Deeply vulnerable (Jan–Mar), talking about the collapse of structure, burnout, medical trauma, and societal pressure to conform to work culture.
* Candid about economic fragility, spiritual disillusionment, and creative ambition.
* Using Forrest as a **witness**, **validator**, and **rationalizer**.
* Now flipping the dynamic: offering Forrest a role in **your legacy-scale project**.
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 6 (chunk 6/206)
